    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What are the camera specs of the Google Pixel 6 Pro?
        The Google Pixel 6 Pro features a triple camera system including a 50 MP wide, 48 MP telephoto, and a 12 MP ultrawide lens. It supports 4x optical zoom and up to 20x Super Res Zoom, making it versatile for various photography needs from portraits to landscapes.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • How does the battery life compare to other smartphones?
        The Google Pixel 6 Pro is equipped with a 5003mAh battery, offering all-day battery life under typical usage. It supports fast charging and wireless charging, which is comparable to other high-end smartphones, providing convenience and efficiency in power management.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • Is the Pixel 6 Pro's display suitable for gaming and video?
        The Pixel 6 Pro boasts a 6.7-inch LTPO OLED display with a 120Hz refresh rate, offering fluid motion and vivid colors. This makes it excellent for gaming and watching high-definition videos, providing an immersive visual experience.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
